title: Level 3 - Advanced
description: Multi-table reasoning, join discovery, and context compression across related schema groups.

cases.query: show unpaid invoices by counsellor with payment status

signals: the planner needs both invoice and payment context before generating SQL
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect join discovery and the schema context passed into SQL generation.

cases.query: show member renewals due this month by branch

signals: renewal range tables can be crowded by related member tables
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Check schema-group retrieval and whether the relevant branch-level renewal table is selected.

cases.query: compare campaign spend and clicks by campaign and date

signals: campaign spend data should come from adset_cost
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect column-level retrieval and whether adset_cost is ranked above similarly named marketing tables.

cases.query: show employees with their workshift and contact details

signals: the request spans employee, workshift, and contact relation paths
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Check whether the planner retrieves both relation metadata and the correct employee/contact schema groups.
